query:
SELECT DISTINCT DATE(transactionDate) as txDate, currency 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE currency IN ('USD', 'EUR', 'GBP')
ORDER BY txDate DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT DISTINCT DATE(transactionDate) as txDate, currency 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE currency IN ('USD', 'EUR', 'GBP')
ORDER BY txDate DESC;
